mnemonics.title: The Three Steps
mnemonics.content: **D**ivide -> **C**onquer -> **C**ombine. Remember it as **D**on't **C**ry **C**hild, the steps are simple.

mnemonics.title: Master Theorem Cases
mnemonics.content:
Compare f(n) to n^(log_b(a)):
1. If f(n) is **S**maller (Polynomially) -> T(n)=Θ(n^(log_b(a)))
2. If f(n) is **S**imilar (Within log^k n) -> T(n)=Θ(n^(log_b(a)) * log^(k+1)n)
3. If f(n) is **L**arger (Polynomially) & Regular -> T(n)=Θ(f(n))
**S**mall, **S**imilar, **L**arge.
